meta.title: Shared Component Showcase — Calendar & Workflow Zoo

max-w-[1200px] mx-auto flex flex-col gap-8 py-10 px-6
font-bold text-gray-900 dark:text-white
text-[14px] text-gray-500 dark:text-gray-400

children.text: Three independent sc-calendar instances (each with its own year/month/selected-date/grid) + one sc-calendar-workflow-zoo instance covering all remaining workflow step types. Each calendar demonstrates all 5 component lifecycle triggers (created, mounted, propertyChange, beforeUnmount, execution).

children.text: Each calendar instance owns isolated scoped variables. Use the buttons inside each calendar to mutate its own state — others are unaffected.

props.className: text-[11px] text-gray-400 dark:text-gray-500

children.text: Workflow step types covered by sc-calendar: branch · multiOptionBranch · forEach · whileLoop · breakLoop · continueLoop · passThroughCondition · timeDelay · navigateTo · navigatePrev · changeVariableValue · setVar · resetVariableValue · executeComponentAction · returnValue

props.className: text-[11px] text-gray-400 dark:text-gray-500

children.text: Workflow step types covered by sc-calendar-workflow-zoo: fetchData · graphql · fetchCollection · fetchCollectionsParallel · updateCollection · uploadFile · downloadFileFromUrl · copyToClipboard · printPdf · createUrlFromBase64 · encodeFileAsBase64 · customJavaScript · openPopup · closeAllPopups · changeLanguage · pageLoader · stopPropagation · runProjectWorkflow · setFormState · resetForm

props.className: text-[11px] text-gray-400 dark:text-gray-500

children.text: Lifecycle triggers demonstrated: created · mounted · propertyChange · beforeUnmount · execution
